title: ageratina latipes
intro: Ageratina latipes, also known as Mexican mountain mint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Ageratina latipes include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems, making it a popular remedy in traditional Mexican medicine. Ageratina latipes can be prepared in various forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
